scope: blind re-audit of post-R21 state for pages 309 + 327 + glossary g_538

findings.defect: Mid-sentence capitalization of 'Unauthorized Access' in running prose looks like a glossary surface form leaked into definition text. Other nouns in the same row (natural disasters, acts of destruction) are lowercase. Reader notices stylistic inconsistency.
findings.evidence_excerpt: Degree of protection of information systems from natural disasters, Unauthorized Access, and acts of destruction

findings.defect: zh keeps literal '安全性' for the system-audit pillar that en correctly renders as 'Security'. zh '安全性' is ambiguous in Chinese (safety vs security) but is the conventional system-audit pillar term in CN ITPM literature; acceptable as-is. Flagged only as a register/precision note.
findings.evidence_excerpt: 信息系统对自然灾害、非法访问和破坏行为的防护程度

findings.defect: NAND is expanded as 'Negative AND' — the standard IT/CS expansion is 'NOT-AND' (or 'Not AND'). 'Negative AND' is a back-translation from Japanese 否定論理積 and is non-standard in English digital-logic literature. The body of the definition correctly says 'It means "NOT AND"', so the parenthetical contradicts the body.
findings.evidence_excerpt: NAND (Negative AND). An operation combining logical AND with negation ... It means "NOT AND".

findings.defect: Same defect as entity 4 — NOR expanded as 'Negative OR'; standard English expansion is 'NOT-OR'. Internal contradiction with body which says 'It means "NOT OR"'.
findings.evidence_excerpt: NOR (Negative OR). An operation combining logical OR with negation ... It means "NOT OR".

findings.defect: zh caption asymmetry between NAND and NOR tables. NAND table zh caption = 'NAND运算的真值表' (bare 'NAND'); NOR table zh caption = '逻辑或非（NOR）运算的真值表' (long form). Either both should use bare abbreviations or both should use the long form; current state is inconsistent within a single page and confuses readers comparing the two tables.
findings.evidence_excerpt: zh NAND caption: 'NAND运算的真值表'  vs  zh NOR caption: '逻辑或非（NOR）运算的真值表'

findings.defect: NOR truth-table header in zh is 'A NOR B（A或非B）' with an inline Chinese gloss, while the parallel NAND truth-table header in zh is bare 'A NAND B' (no gloss). Within the same page, the same kind of header should be formatted the same way. Looks like a localizer reached for an extra gloss on NOR but did not apply it to NAND. Asymmetric content (educator concern) + visual noise (reader concern).
findings.evidence_excerpt: NAND zh header: 'A NAND B'  vs  NOR zh header: 'A NOR B（A或非B）'

findings.defect: Minor stylistic inconsistency: zh definition uses inline '（XOR）' gloss before the '日语称为' sentence — different parenthetical structure than entities 0/1/3 which only use the '日语称为「...」' pattern. Not wrong; cosmetic.
findings.evidence_excerpt: 两个布尔输入不同（一真一假）时输出真（1），相同时输出假（0）的逻辑运算（XOR）。日语称为「排他的論理和」。

findings.defect: zh surface '主机租用服务' is non-standard for 'ホスティングサービス'. Conventional Chinese term is '主机托管服务' (web/server hosting) or '虚拟主机服务' (shared hosting). '主机租用' specifically means 'host rental', which is one mode of hosting but does not cover shared/cloud hosting. kana_helper.zh_concept matches surface.zh so internal consistency holds; flagged only for terminological precision.
findings.evidence_excerpt: surface.zh='主机租用服务'; kana_helper.zh_concept='主机租用服务'

verdict_justification: Zero FAIL findings. Both pages are semantically correct at the IT-pro lens (system-audit Security pillar correctly mapped to 'Security' in en; truth tables for NAND/NOR computed correctly; CIA triad complete; logic-op definitions match their truth tables). 5 WARN findings are stylistic/terminological asymmetries that do not block release but should be tracked for polish: (1) leaked capitalization in p309 en, (2-3) non-standard 'Negative AND/OR' expansions on p327 en that contradict the body text, (4-5) zh NOR table caption + header asymmetry vs NAND table on same page. 3 INFO are cosmetic. Glossary g_538 is internally consistent across surface/kana_helper/zh_concept; the zh term choice is non-standard but defensible. Release-impacting pages: 0.
